name: Slime Girl Transformation
description:
You were a strong adventurer, delving dungeons and looting treasure... who would have thought that it would end like this?
After a successful solo adventure into a cave filled with slimes and monster girls, you get caught by a trap that changes your life forever... and to make matters worse you have been captured by bandits! Will you escape and make a new life for yourself or succumb to the whims of the bandits.
---
The bandits in this are pretty aggressive so it will include 'forced fun' as they try to corrupt you into their toy.
---
This one is a little more darker than I usually make, the main antagonist turned out to be a real shit bag, but I kind of liked it, so I kept it. Have fun! 
*Includes: Transformation, body swap, bodyswap, gender bending, genderbending, tf, forced, corruption*
creator: Zennex
